pizza_base:
1. sbse phle pani garam kro.
2. Ek pteele me ( Maida, Yeast, Cheeni, Namak ) daal kr ache se mix kro.

3. ab thoda-thoda pani milate huye aate ko dough bana lo.
4. ab thoda thoda oil dalte huye knead kro total 10 minute mtlb 10 minute
5. Base ko minimum 2 hour, best 3 hour fermentate hone ke liye dhakkar rkh do.

[pro tip:- fermentation ke baad aate ko weight ke hisba se dough bnane ke baad chaho to 15 minute ke liye rkh do jisse pump acha hota hai.]

ek base ka weight km se km 130 gram for 6-7 inch, 160 gram for 8-9 inch piza, 200 gram for 9-10 inch pizza.
pizza_sauce:
1. Tamatar ko wash karke cut kar lo.
2. Mixer me grind karke smooth puree bana lo.
3. Pan me oil garam karo.
4. Garlic halka sa bhuno.
5. Tomato puree daal kar medium flame par pakao.
6. Salt, sugar, red chilli, black pepper daal do.
7. 15-20 minute tak pakao jab tak sauce thick na ho jaye.
8. End me oregano, chilli flakes aur ketchup daal kar 2 minute aur pakao.
9. Thanda hone ke baad use karo ya store karo.
momos:
1. Maida, namak aur oil mix karo.
2. Pani daal kar tight dough bana lo.
3. 20 minute rest do.
4. Filling ke liye oil garam karo.
5. Garlic aur ginger bhuno.
6. Sab vegetables high flame par 2-3 minute toss karo.
7. Salt, pepper aur soya sauce daal do.
8. Dough ke 20g balls bana lo.
9. 15g filling daal kar shape karo.
10. 8-10 minute steam karo.
momo_chutney:
1. Tomato aur dry red chilli 5 minute boil karo.
2. Mixer me tomato, chilli aur garlic grind karo.
3. Pan me oil garam karo.
4. Puree daal kar 5 minute pakao.
5. Salt aur sugar daal do.
6. End me vinegar daal kar 1 minute pakao.
7. Thanda hone ke baad serve karo.
burger_patty:
1. Uble hue aloo ko achchhe se mash karo.
2. Carrot, beans aur sweet corn ko halka boil karke pani nikal do.
3. Sab vegetables ko mashed aloo me mix karo.
4. Salt, red chilli, white pepper aur garlic powder daal do.
5. Bread crumbs aur corn flour milakar tight mixture bana lo.
6. 70 gram ka portion lekar round patty shape do.
7. Patty ko bread crumbs me coat karo.
8. Medium flame par shallow fry karo jab tak golden brown na ho jaye.
